supplyId.description: Yieldlab Supply ID. Please reach out to your account management for more information.

iabContent.description: Object of content information, see [IAB Content Object](#iab_content) for details. It will override the content object passed in [First Party Data](https://docs.prebid.org/features/firstPartyData.html)

customParams.description: Custom parameters to append to the query string of the bidding endpoint.
